title: lindernia ciliata
intro: Lindernia ciliata, also known as the small-flowered false lipenia or false lipenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Linderniaceae. It is a perennial herb that is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia, Australia, and the Pacific Islands. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. Lindernia ciliata can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to promote digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system.
